[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'DIY plumbing repair' signals consumer stress rebound",
    "family": "consumer_stress",

      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true

    "behavior": "An uptick in DIY plumbing repair searches indicates rising household maintenance stress, often preceding increased discretionary spending on home goods.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Consumer discretionary benefits as stressed consumers invest in home repairs and upgrades."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter long XLY if weekly Google Trends index for 'DIY plumbing repair' rises 15% week-over-week",
      "exit": "Exit after 3 weeks or if index drops 10% week-over-week",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Weekly search interest for home repair topics fluctuates regularly with seasonal and stress-driven spikes."
  },
